_doc: CANONICAL program state — the SINGLE source for the auto-generated status blocks. Edit THIS, then run `python3 tools/render_state.py --write` to refresh every <!-- BEGIN GENERATED:* --> block across the context docs (README, SESSION_BOOTSTRAP, SESSION_CHECKPOINT, EXPERIMENT_RUNBOOK §0.3, PROGRESS ⑤). Never hand-edit between the GENERATED markers. This is the 'generate-what's-mechanical' half of the anti-drift design (the other half = narrative fingerprints in tools/closeout_fingerprints.json). The pre-commit hook blocks commits where these blocks are stale vs this file.
updated: 2026-06-26 (C10 band-knob done — later [8,12] NO MATERIAL RESCUE; D-C10e-bandknob/CORPUS/37; wider/strength knobs still untested)
north_star: F1 — prove/falsify the 'LLM-as-Database' spec is implementable BEFORE it is built; deliver a ready / not-ready-with-conditions determination. Falsification-first.
current_latest:
**DEPLOYMENT TARGET FIXED (operator): `local Intel CPU + batch writes` → F1 re-scoped + first on-target falsifier fired.** Re-scope (advisor-checked for over-rotation): C4/§8.7/D1-incremental DROP from the critical path (incremental-only); **C1 REFRAMES** to batch-genesis-cleanliness-at-scale (gated on target fact-count, NOT deleted); **C10 multi-token values ELEVATED**. **C10 (D-C10-1, CORPUS/35) = FALSIFIER FIRED:** 3-arm novel-insert at the N≤100 batch path (binding = held-out-paraphrase full-sequence) — single-token 97.2% & prior-COHERENT multi-token 97.2% robust, but arbitrary INCOHERENT multi-token values 36.1% (first-token 70.8%; conditional P(full|first)=0.51 vs coherent 1.00). The edit FITS the trained prompt (95.8%) but does NOT GENERALIZE to paraphrases → the multi-token instance of the R13/R5 trained-prompt-parrot axis. **C10 = the FIRST condition both on the critical path for the fixed target AND failing → OPEN MUST-FIX; named fix = AnyEdit per-token editing.** 3 advisor gates + Perplexity cross-family; scoped 3B/band[4-8]/AlphaEdit/N≤100/1-seed/HF-fp16 (single-token + prior-coherent values already robust). F1 net readiness UNCHANGED (NOT-READY-WITH-CONDITIONS) but the target now has a concrete blocker with a known fix to try. ⮕ FOLLOW-UP (c10c, D-C10b-diverse): tested whether paraphrase-diverse training rescues the incoherent failure — it does NOT cleanly (CANON+PTRAIN degraded everything via 3×-request interference → uninformative); replicates C10 (38.9≈36.1). The wall is GENERALIZATION at the continuation position, cleanly localized (single-token 97% → first-of-multi 82% → continuation collapses) — a reasonable mechanistic case FOR the AnyEdit fix (canon=100% is a teacher-forcing artifact, not 'already solved'). AnyEdit port = OPERATOR-GATED (multi-day; mechanistic case but payoff empirically unproven; PORT jianghoucheng/AnyEdit, don't reimplement). Alternative: accept C10 as a documented value-class limitation (single-token + prior-coherent values work today). ⮕ SEVERITY BOUND (spec-grounded, advisor-corrected — NOT a downgrade): §7.1/D1 (LLM=semantics, Git=syntax) removes the SYNTACTIC subset (paths/identifiers/exact strings → Git) from the in-weight fragility surface, BUT the fragility axis is prior-coherence (orthogonal to syntax) → the residual = project-coined multi-word SEMANTIC named entities (§7.2 domain_concept) with no prior = the non-prior-coherent fragile class, plausibly ENRICHED (the value-prop of an in-weight project KB is exactly the base-model-unknown facts). C10 stays OPEN/CONDITIONAL: bites iff CORE in-weight facts include project-novel multi-word semantic values (a project KB likely has). Both the AnyEdit port AND an empirical residual-test are OPERATOR-GATED.

**⮕ RESIDUAL-TEST DONE 2026-06-26 (D-C10b-residual, CORPUS/36 — operator's Option B): RESIDUAL FRAGILE.** 7-arm novel-insert (same 24 fictional subjects): single 98.6% & coherent-bigram 98.6% robust, but **realistic project-coined multi-word SEMANTIC values express at only 19–31% held-out-paraphrase full-seq** (RANGE [A7 coined-coined 19.4%, A6 coined+real-noun 30.6%]) — ≪ the 85% gate, below the 2-tok floor (45.8%) AND the original C10 floor (36%) because they tokenize LONG (4–5.5 tok). **→ the severity-bound prediction is empirically confirmed: the in-weight value class a real project KB holds IS fragile, not a corner case.** Two precise claims: (1) C10 CONDITION CONFIRMED-and-WORSENED; (2) dominant MECHANISM = a DISTINCT multi-token length-realization wall, NOT C10's fit-then-fail parrot — realistic arms fail to even FIT the canonical prompt (canon 37–46% vs floor 95.8%). z-probe (advisor cheap-check): compute_z reaches 0.99 target-prob for ALL classes @25≈100 steps → NOT a *compute_z* knob (z-target achievable at 0.99); bottleneck RELOCATES to W-realization, whose knobs (band/layer-count/edit-strength) are UNTESTED → option A (AnyEdit) CONSISTENT-not-proven-necessary; cheap resolver = wider/later band BEFORE a port. Continuation prior-coherence mildly protective per-tok (60–72% vs 46%) but length-overwhelmed. Advisor before build+verdict; Perplexity cross-family on interpretation. F1 net readiness UNCHANGED. Scope 3B/band[4-8]/N≤24/1-seed; NOT promotable.

**⮕ BAND-KNOB DONE 2026-06-26 (D-C10e-bandknob ⟨D-C10e-bandknob@82b491dc⟩, CORPUS/37): NO MATERIAL KNOB RESCUE.** C10e tested the cheapest W-realization knob before AnyEdit: baseline `[4,8]` vs later `[8,12]` on the hard A7 coined-coined arm, with A1/A2 controls. Later band **does NOT rescue held-out behavioral readout**: A7 `para_full` worsens **13.9 to 5.6** (-8.3pp), `para_first` worsens **75.0 to 33.3**, and teacher-forced continuation worsens **60.2 to 34.0**. The canonical trained-prompt diagnostic improves only **29.2 to 45.8** (+16.6pp), still below the pre-registered rescue threshold and below 60; `para_full` remains binding. A1/A2 controls remain high (97.2 / 91.7 later), so the failure is within-tested-arms specific to long no-prior coined-coined values. Scope 3B/N=24/1-seed/HF-fp16; NOT promotable. This eliminates the pure later-band explanation only; wider `[4,12]`, layer-count/edit-strength, and AnyEdit remain untested/consistent-not-proven-necessary. F1 readiness unchanged.
next_actions: DEPLOYMENT TARGET = local Intel CPU + batch writes (re-Genesis model). F1 CONCLUDED but the target has a concrete on-critical-path blocker (C10). Operator-steer, in priority:

(1) C10 — RESIDUAL FRAGILE plus BAND-KNOB NO MATERIAL RESCUE (D-C10b-residual/CORPUS/36; D-C10e-bandknob ⟨D-C10e-bandknob@82b491dc⟩/CORPUS/37): realistic project-coined multi-word SEMANTIC values remain the on-target blocker. Later `[8,12]` alone fails: A7 para_full 13.9 to 5.6 while canon_full only 29.2 to 45.8, so pure later-band W-realization is not enough. Remaining OPERATOR-GATED choices: (A) AnyEdit port (multi-day; mechanistically consistent, not proven necessary; PORT jianghoucheng/AnyEdit), (B) one more cheap W-realization knob before the port — widened `[4,12]` or edit-strength/layer-count on A7, (C) accept-as-bounded, viable only if CORE in-weight values are single-token / prior-coherent. Residual-test and pure later-band test are COMPLETE.
(2) Q4_K_M survival of multi-token values (B3 covered single-token only) — the CPU-serve quantization check for the fixed target.
(3) batch-genesis-at-scale cleanliness (C1 reframed) — gated on TARGET FACT-COUNT (worth pinning: single solve under the 2000 cap vs sub-batched = the D20 cliff).
(4) real-Intel-CPU serving validation (E1 was a pod-CPU proxy; the operator's actual hardware unvalidated).
